utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all of these six items. Checking completeness: (1) property – fully specified with type, location, price, size, layout, features, and move-in date. (2) financing – fully specified with mortgage type, down payment, interest rate, term, and fees. (3) legal_services – specified with service name and cost. (4) moving_services – specified with service level and cost. (5) setup_services – specified with package name, cost, and included utilities. (6) total_budget – specified with detailed breakdown of all costs. Thus, all six required items are present and fully specified. The extra 'survey_services' item does not affect the count, as it was not required.
